summary: Comprehensive testing of Quest of Honor refactoring session - 39/39 backend tests passed (100%), frontend loads correctly with 3D game world. All bug fixes verified: rotation persistence, quest dialog NPC filtering, and EnemyAISystem/CombatSystem extraction.
critical_code_review_comments: EnemyAISystem.js correctly exports: AI_CONSTANTS, createPatrolData, createCombatState, shouldAggro, shouldLeash, chasePlayer, maintainSpreadPosition, activateAggro, etc.
CombatSystem.js correctly exports: COMBAT_CONSTANTS, XP_THRESHOLDS, createDamageText, updateEnemyHealthBar, getMobDifficultyColor, calculateXPGain, etc.
GameWorld.jsx imports both systems at lines 22-46 and uses them throughout combat AI loop (lines 8000-8126)
Rotation persistence bug fixed at line 8384 - handleSaveWorld now includes rotation field in world_objects mapping
Quest Dialog NPC filtering fixed at line 60 - returns false when no npcId, preventing showing all quests to wrong NPCs
seed_data_creation: Test users and objects created dynamically with UUID prefixes for each test, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refactoring verified working: (1) EnemyAISystem.js handles AI behavior - patrol, aggro, leash, chase, spread positioning - called from GameWorld.jsx combat AI loop at line 7986+. (2) CombatSystem.js handles damage text, health bars, XP calculations - used throughout GameWorld.jsx. (3) Rotation field persists through save-all endpoint. (4) Quest dialog only shows quests for specific NPC ID. World objects, enemies, terrain all load correctly from database.

bug_fixes: Object rotation persistence - rotation field now included in handleSaveWorld (line 8384)
Quest Dialog NPC filtering - only shows quests for assigned NPC (line 60: if (!npcId) return false)
system_extractions: EnemyAISystem.js - AI constants, patrol patterns, combat state, aggro/leash detection, chase/spread behavior
CombatSystem.js - Combat constants, damage text, health bars, XP/leveling calculations
imports_verified: GameWorld.jsx line 22-35: imports from EnemyAISystem (createCombatState, shouldAggro, shouldLeash, etc.)
GameWorld.jsx line 36-46: imports from CombatSystem (createDamageText, getMobDifficultyColor, calculateXPGain, etc.)
backend_apis_tested: World data - zones, monsters, objects, enemies (4 tests)
frontend_verified: 3D game world renders (47 world objects loaded)
HUD displays (HP/MP/XP bars, minimap, action bar)

test_credentials: Dynamic test users created with pattern: test_{uuid}@test.com / password123
